phrases.intent_en: Ask where the souvenir shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de souvenirs?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Souvenir shops in Portuguese monuments are typically located at the exit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the souvenir shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de lembranças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH laymb-RAHNNG-suhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: A loja de lembranças está localizada na saída, como indicado nas tarefas comuns.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baptismal font is
phrases.cultural_note: A Fonte Baptismal é uma peça histórica localizada no interior da Sé Velha.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fonte Baptismal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih buhp-teezh-MAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Baptismal Font.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Baptismal Font.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih buhp-teezh-MAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Fonte Baptismal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rose of Rosaceae is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a rosácea da fachada principal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH roo-ZAH-seeuh DUH fuh-SHAH-duh preen-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The rose window is a defining Gothic element facing the historic square.

likely_response.local: Fica no centro da fachada, acima da porta principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH fuh-SHAH-duh, uh-SEE-muh DUH PAW-ruh-tuh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the center of the facade, above the main door.

responses.english: It is in the center of the facade, above the main door.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH fuh-SHAH-duh, uh-SEE-muh DUH PAW-ruh-tuh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Fica no centro da fachada, acima da porta principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baptismal font is
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a pia batismal?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PEEUH buh-teezh-MAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditionally placed near entrances for early Christian rites.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fonte Baptismal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih buhp-teezh-MAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Baptismal Font.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Baptismal Font.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih buhp-teezh-MAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Fonte Baptismal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cathedral Treasury is
phrases.text_local: Em que piso se encontra o Tesouro da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: AYNG KIH PEE-zoo SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW teh-ZOHW-roo DUH SEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The treasury houses liturgical artifacts and sacred art collections.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Tesouro da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW teh-ZOHW-roo DUH SEH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira, eles podem ajudá-lo a localizar o Tesouro da Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAH-LOO AH loo-kuh-lee-ZAHR AW teh-ZOHW-roo DUH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office, they can help you locate the Cathedral Treasury.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office, they can help you locate the Cathedral Treasury.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAH-LOO AH loo-kuh-lee-ZAHR AW teh-ZOHW-roo DUH SEH.
responses.french: Pergunte na bilheteira, eles podem ajudá-lo a localizar o Tesouro da Sé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the combined cathedral and museum ticket is sold
phrases.text_local: Onde se compra o bilhete combinado Sé e Museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH KOHMP-ruh AW bee-LYEH-tih koom-bee-NAH-doo SEH EH moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets are standard for Portuguese heritage sites.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira unificada, à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh, AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the unified ticket office, at the entrance.

responses.english: Good day, at the unified ticket office, at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh, AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na bilheteira unificada, à entrada.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o claustro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cloister.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cloister.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o claustro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rose of Rosaceae is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a Rosa do Rosáceo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH RAW-zuh DOO roo-ZAH-seeoo?
phrases.cultural_note: A Rosa do Rosáceo é um elemento arquitetónico importante, localizada na fachada ou interior da Sé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Romanesque Cloister is
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Claustro Românico da catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW KLOWSHT-roo roo-MAHN-nee-koo DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The cloister is a historic monastic space attached to the cathedral.

likely_response.translation_en: Access it through the interior of the cathedral.

responses.english: Access it through the interior of the cathedral.
